recommendations.title: Barbie: Star Light Adventure
recommendations.overview: When Barbie, a cosmic princess with a hoverboard, learns that the brightly shining stars have begun to dim, she begins a rescue mission to save the galaxy.

recommendations.title: Batman Returns

recommendations.title: Batman: Return of the Caped Crusaders
recommendations.genres: Action, Animation, Adventure, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Adam West and Burt Ward returns to their iconic roles of Batman and Robin. The film sees the superheroes going up against classic villains like The Joker, The Riddler, The Penguin and Catwoman, both in Gotham City… and in space.

recommendations.title: Barbie & Her Sisters in a Puppy Chase
recommendations.overview: Barbie and her sisters go to an island paradise for a dance competition, but they must work together as a team to find their pets after their furry friends go missing at a horse festival.
recommendations.director: Ken Cunningham, Michael Goguen, Conrad Helten

recommendations.title: LEGO Batman: The Movie - DC Super Heroes Unite
recommendations.overview: Joker teams up with Lex Luthor to destroy the world one brick at a time. It's up to Batman, Superman and the rest of the Justice League to stop them.
